# OpenAVC v0.19.2

- **Uninstall OpenAVC on macOS.** The macOS app now has a proper uninstaller.
  Click the menu-bar icon and choose Uninstall OpenAVC, or run the bundled
  uninstaller from Terminal. It stops the background service and the menu-bar
  app and removes the application. Your projects and settings are kept unless
  you choose to remove them. (Dragging the app to the Trash on its own does not
  stop the background service.)

- **macOS app icon.** The macOS app now shows the OpenAVC icon in Finder and the
  Applications folder instead of a generic placeholder.
